description: User examines the travel dates calendar, hovering over March 11 while considering options.
frame_description: The travel dates modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage.

description: User selects March 20, 2026 as the new departure date.
User hovers over March 21 while deciding on a return date.
User selects March 22, 2026 as the return date, which updates the estimated price to from A$239.
User moves the cursor to the 'Done' button to confirm the date selection.
